title: scorzoneroides montana subsp. breviscapa
intro: Scorzoneroides montana subsp. breviscapa, also known as the Short-spurred Scorzonera, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve inflammation. Its health benefits are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal infusion or tea, and it can also be used in tincture or dried form for its medicinal uses.
